# Mail Restrict Send Button

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Hide the Send Message button from Chatter area If "Show Send Message Button" group not assigned to User.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

Assign the group "Show Send Message Button" to any User to use the Send Message button in any chatter area.
If you are not giving that access to User then User can't access Send Message button, It doesn't appear.
